errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You need to sign in to continue.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please slow down.

clients.title: Clients
clients.description: Everyone you work with, in one place.
clients.empty: No clients yet. Invite your first one.

leads.title: Leads
leads.description: People who reached out — convert them into clients.

profile.title: Professional profile
profile.description: Your name, photo, and bio are shown on the client portal and any published micro-site.
profile.bioPlaceholder: One or two paragraphs shown on your micro-site.
profile.photoHint: PNG, JPG, WebP or GIF. Up to 5 MB.

locale.title: Locale
locale.description: Controls the default timezone, language, and currency we use for your invoices, reminders, and calendar feed.
locale.languageHint: The app UI will switch to this language.

portal.title: Your portal
portal.welcomeDescription: Your upcoming sessions, messages, and latest updates will live here.
portal.readyDescription: As your professional shares documents, forms, or messages with you, they'll appear on this page.

home.eyebrow: The universal CRM boilerplate for service professionals
home.heroTitle: Run your practice, not your tooling.
home.heroSubtitle: CorePro gives coaches, consultants, and agents a client portal, scheduling, messaging, invoicing, and a marketing micro-site — in one branded workspace.
home.featuresSubtitle: Replace five tools with one. Keep your brand on every touchpoint.

crm.title: Client CRM
crm.body: Profiles, tags, notes, activity — the full relationship on one screen.

leads.title: Lead pipeline
leads.body: Drag-and-drop Kanban that converts won leads into clients in a click.

messaging.title: Real-time messaging
messaging.body: Branded client portal with file-sharing and read receipts baked in.

bookings.title: Bookings & reminders
bookings.body: Public booking widget, iCal export, automated reminder emails.

forms.title: Forms, invoices, docs
forms.body: Build forms, track invoices, manage documents from a single workspace.

automations.title: Automations & micro-site
automations.body: Trigger.dev-powered flows and a publishable marketing micro-site per pro.

home.ctaBody: Start on the free tier — upgrade when your first paying client signs up.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, scale as your practice grows. Cancel anytime.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell me a bit about what you need
contact.success: Thanks — I'll be in touch shortly.
contact.error: Couldn't send your message. Please try again.

welcome.subject: Welcome to {workspace}
welcome.heading: Welcome, {name}
welcome.body: Thanks for joining {workspace}. You can sign in any time to your client portal.

invitation.subject: {sender} invited you to {workspace}
invitation.preview: You've been invited to join the portal.
invitation.heading: You're invited
invitation.body: {sender} has invited you to collaborate on {workspace}. Click below to accept.

clientInvitation.subject: {sender} invited you as a client
clientInvitation.heading: You're invited as a client
clientInvitation.body: {sender} uses CorePro to coordinate sessions, documents, and messages with their clients. Accept the invite to get started.

appointmentReminder.subject: Reminder: {title} on {date}
appointmentReminder.heading: Upcoming appointment
appointmentReminder.body: This is a friendly reminder about {title} on {date} at {time}.

formAssigned.subject: New form to fill out: {formTitle}
formAssigned.preview: A new form is waiting for you.
formAssigned.heading: New form assigned
formAssigned.body: {sender} has shared a form with you: {formTitle}. Fill it out whenever you have a moment.

newMessage.subject: New message from {sender}
newMessage.heading: New message
newMessage.body: {sender} sent you a new message in your portal.

invoice.subject: Invoice {number} from {sender}
invoice.heading: Invoice {number}
invoice.body: Here is invoice {number} for {amount}. You can pay securely with the link below.

invoiceReminder.subject: Reminder: invoice {number} is due
invoiceReminder.heading: Invoice reminder
invoiceReminder.body: Just a gentle reminder — invoice {number} for {amount} is due on {dueDate}.

weeklySummary.subject: Your week in numbers
weeklySummary.heading: Weekly summary
weeklySummary.body: Here's a quick roll-up of your last 7 days.

gdprExport.subject: Your data export is ready
gdprExport.heading: Data export ready
gdprExport.body: Your personal-data export is available below. The link expires in 24 hours.
